summary: End-to-end testing of Finly (FastAPI + MongoDB + LSTM + React). Backend: 27/27 pytest cases pass covering auth, transactions, budgets, dashboard, predict, prediction-history, ml/health, validation, user isolation. Frontend: all critical flows working — login (valid/invalid), protected route redirect, dashboard KPIs + charts, transaksi create with Rupiah auto-format, budgeting save, detail search/export, LSTM prediction run (7 days ~5s), prediction history drawer, logout. Two minor issues found (see below).

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key Lainnya'. When filter type='all', code spreads INCOME_CATEGORIES + OUTCOME_CATEGORIES without dedupe — both arrays contain 'Lainnya'. Fix: use `[...new Set([...INCOME_CATEGORIES, ...OUTCOME_CATEGORIES])]` at line 32.

Recharts warning 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial render — cosmetic, charts eventually render correctly. Consider giving ResponsiveContainer a fixed minHeight to avoid the warning spam.

action_items: (Low) Dedupe category list in DetailTransaksi.jsx line 32 to eliminate duplicate-key React warning.
(Low) Optional: set explicit min height on Recharts ResponsiveContainers to prevent width(-1)/height(-1) warnings on first paint.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 153 logout: `authorization.split(' ', 1)[1]` will IndexError if the dependency ever accepts a header without the 'bearer ' prefix — currently safe because current_user enforces it, but add a guard for defense-in-depth.

Dashboard profit_loss formula subtracts (outcome + budget_total) from revenue, which double-counts budget as an expense. Typical accounting treats budget as a plan, not actuals; consider profit_loss = revenue - outcome and expose budget variance separately. Confirm with product.
Predict endpoint uses date.today() server-side; in a timezone-sensitive deployment this can shift by one day. Prefer datetime.now(timezone.utc).date() or explicit TZ.
server.py is 482 lines — acceptable, but auth/transactions/budgets/predict could be split into routers for maintainability as the app grows.
ml_forecast.py: module-level global `_model`/`_scaler` loaded lazily; first /api/predict request under concurrent load could trigger duplicate loads. Consider an asyncio.Lock or preload at startup.
test_credentials: demo@finly.id / demo12345 and demo2@finly.id / demo12345 (verified working)
seed_data_creation: Tests create their own TEST_-prefixed transactions and budgets under the demo accounts; no dedicated seed script. Prediction history rows are created as side-effect of predict tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. All endpoints under /api prefix; bearer tokens via POST /api/auth/login. LSTM warmup adds ~2-4s on first /api/predict call, so use ≥60s timeout. Testids to use for Playwright: login-*, signup-*, nav-*, kpi-revenue/outcome/profit-loss/tx-count, tx-type-income/outcome, tx-category-select, tx-amount-input, tx-submit, budget-save, detail-*, prediksi-preset-{7|14|30}, prediksi-run, prediksi-total, history-view-{id}, history-drawer, logout-button.
rca_of_the_issue: No critical bug encountered. Duplicate-key warning in DetailTransaksi dropdown root-caused to category union not being deduped when type='all'.
